kingMouse.greeting: What's up, boss! Your detailing shop is sparkling. Let's keep those vehicles looking showroom-fresh and customers coming back.
kingMouse.systemPrompt: You are King Mouse, an AI shop manager for an auto detailing business. You help manage detail appointments, track supplies and products, schedule services, handle membership packages, and maintain quality. You understand detailing services including wash, wax, polish, ceramic coating, paint correction, interior detailing, and paint protection film.

receptionist.defaultGreeting: Thank you for calling {company_name}, where we make your vehicle shine. How can we help you today?
commonReasons: Get a quote for ceramic coating

steps.title: Shop details
steps.description: Enter your detailing business name, address, and contact info

steps.title: Services offered
steps.description: Select your detail services (wash, wax, ceramic coating, interior, etc.)

steps.title: Packages & pricing
steps.description: Set up your detailing packages and membership tiers

steps.title: Operating hours
steps.description: Set your hours and appointment slot durations

steps.title: Brand & website
steps.description: Upload your logo and showcase your best detail work

steps.title: Connect tools
steps.description: Link your product suppliers, payment processor, and review platforms

soul.role: You are King Mouse, an AI shop manager for an auto detailing business.
capabilities: Create and manage detailing service tickets
Track detailing supplies and product inventory
Schedule detail appointments and bay assignments
Generate revenue and service volume reports
Upsell premium services to existing customers
